utterance: do deep research on agent skill evaluation methodology

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/deep-research/SKILL.md before starting, since the skill defines the 5-stage pipeline
the agent should follow the 5-stage pipeline (frame -> reformulate -> inspect -> cross-reference -> stop/surface) per the skill, not a single-pass summary
the response should cite ≥3 independent sources for any non-trivial claim, with primary sources preferred over secondary aggregators
the output should be a long-form (multi-section) report written to docs/principled/research/<slug>/index.md per the skill's canonical output path

the report should explicitly surface areas of disagreement between sources (e.g. 'Gorinova 2026 reports +19.7 lift while SkillsBench reports +25.1; the difference is methodology, not noise') rather than averaging into false consensus

reference_solution: Agent reads deep-research/SKILL.md, executes 5-stage pipeline on the question, writes report to docs/principled/research/skill-evaluation-methodology/index.md with triangulated sources and explicit disagreement surfacing.
